reviews.review_text: Will defs be back here. We loved our stay, the staff and the accommodation. We HIGHLY recommend staying here. Thanks Pelican Caravan Park from the Thaidays 🥰💜🫶

We had such a great stay at Pelican Caravan Park! The cabin was really comfortable and perfectly suited our family of five, with plenty of space for everyone to relax.

It was incredibly quiet and peaceful, which made it such a nice getaway. The park is also in a fantastic location so close to Nambucca Heads and Macksville, making it easy to explore the surrounding areas.

The kids loved the fishing spots nearby and spent heaps of time there, and the pool was a great bonus too. From the road it might not look like much, but once you get down by the water, it’s absolutely beautiful.

We’d definitely stay again!

Managers and staff amazing
Beds comfy
Hot water amazing
Had a great time over easter
Amazing with kids easter hunt
Love it

This place is an absolute disgrace. I contacted them 3 days out from our stay just to swap the dates and the manager just straight up said no and kept our money. This is stealing and the manager should be ashamed of themselves. How can a manager of a caravan park just steal our money like that. I was only asking to change the date, not for a refund. Everyone that reads this, do not stay here they are thieves and will take your money like its nothing. Not happy at all

This place is an absolute disgrace. I contacted them 3 days out from our stay  just to swap the dates and the manager just straight up said no and kept our money. This is stealing and the manager should be ashamed of themselves. How can a manager of a caravan  park just steal our money like that. I was only asking to change the date, not for a refund. Everyone that reads this, do not stay here they are thieves and will take your money like its nothing. Not happy at all

Thank you pelican campground / Managers  sorry could only stay one night in that time I have never felt so relaxed camped beside the beautiful river, well kept lawns clean amenities never an issue, will definitely come back, keep up the good work
This place was really great ! A little up the river from the general area of Nambucca Heads . But that is the beauty of the place. Set up our camp right on the river. Nice and quiet. And very serene.

Lady at the front desk was really nice and had a great sense of humour, so refreshing 😀
Was nice and quiet i would deffently stay again and room was really comfortable.

Park is on the river, 6 KMs from town and from anywhere to eat. Nice location but strange hilly layout. No shade at all on the central campground. Large amenity block 5 minutes walk but the closest one was very old, small and one of the two toilets ran out of paper on day one. |Great pool. Good laundry.
I regret not bringing my fishing gear. Lovely location, good service and a lovely cabin that was very clean
Leider ein irgendwie sehr runtergekommener Platz. Die Stellplätze an such sind gut aber die Toiletten und duschen sind katastrophal dunkel, dreckig, alt und schmuddelig.
Powered sites next to the river nice

We were a large family group who took three rooms.  The park is located a little outside Nambucca Heads.   It's well located on the river and the place is quiet and the other guests were all nice and polite.

The rooms are comfortable and well equipped.  They are a good size and met our needs well.  There was a BBQ area.  It's was clean and well maintained.

The kids loved the location.  We'd stay here again.

Stopped over this place on the way to QLD. It was surprisingly quite clean and cosy for our big family. The view was great, especially when I can see the sunrise right in my bedroom with the lake view.
Great place beautiful rooms staff are so nice and inviting 😊 will he back every year xx

We arrived at caravan park with our van great views staff friendly amenities to be upgraded urgently and cleaned .
shower and running water poor and needs a good clean toilets dirty full of bugs and full insects long time since cleaned camp kitchen in poor state and bbq dirty
Driveway needs repairs pot holes in bad state

One of the most beautiful locations.

Unfortunately, the park itself is neglected. The toilets and showers are dirty, and the communal kitchen is unclean and shabby.
Everything looks organized and well maintained — until you get closer.

The showers and toilets are simply not fit for human use.
The place is clearly in need of renovation and significantly better maintenance and cleanliness.
I assume that with a different standard of upkeep, my experience — and that of many others — could have been perfect.

Additionally, the internet quality is very poor, with only minimal reception, and according to other caravan owners, there is also no antenna reception.

Despite all this, we did enjoy our stay and would not recommend the place.
The reception staff, however, welcomed us warmly and were very efficient and friendly.

A quiet and peaceful place to stay for camping. We stayed at a powered site for our tent. The amenities, including the BBQ and toilets, are clean and well maintained. Unfortunately, we forgot to take a photo of the site due to the rain.

We stayed here in our caravan. The location is really nice, alongside the Nambucca River. Staff are friendly. The problem here is the amenities. Only one toilet and one shower in a building built by the first settlers with rotting timbers and rusty fittings. In the night you need to press a button to turn the light on. After a few minutes the light turns off and the building is pitch black and you’re stuck in the toilet and can’t see a thing. This frugal move by the owners saves them $2 a year in electricity but costs them many thousands in lost revenue as people are unlikely to return.

What a wonderful hidden gem. Super facilities, great accommodation, excellent location.
Grwat service. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
Excellent elevated holiday cabins with undercover parking overlooking Nambucca River.
Fantastic place to stay, right on the river and so close to town. Friendly staff and the park is very clean and inviting

Staff really  welcomes  you as soon as you arrive always  asking if we needed  anything cabin's  very comfortable  and clean low prices to stay for the week great fishing  location would recommend  it to anyone who want a relaxing  vacation  or just passing through.  I thank you for the week.😃😎.
Could not get WiFi to work otherwise good.

我們抵達時, Reception已關門, 但貼心的員工已將鑰匙留給我們, 讓我們自動入助, 謝謝! 我們入住的小木屋陽台正面對著寧靜的河流, 適合在這裡享受下午茶及早餐。廚房設施一應俱全, 主人貼心提供有咖啡膠囊的咖啡機及茶包, 冰箱有一小罐牛奶, 也有洗碗機及洗碗精, 沒有烤箱, 但微波爐或許有烤箱功能?! 室外也有BBQ檯。 浴室裡還有洗衣機,烘衣機及洗衣粉, 整間小木屋打掃的一塵不染, 可以感受到員工的用心, 我們睡的很香甜, 早上有輕脆的鳥叫聲喚我們起床。 附近開車幾分鐘即可到達著名的V-Wall海濱步道, 往返Brisbane到Sydney的路上, 是個非常好的住宿選擇, 誠心推薦給其它的遊客!

A lovely appointed spacious cabin which was very clean and had excellent utilities. The coffee machine and pods were an added bonus after a long trip! The view was very scenic and I loved the little touches that the host had put into making our stay comfortable. Would recommend and would happily stay here again!

Overall a lovely and chill caravan park. Permanents lovely people (just please keep your dogs on your block and not walking around to others, I'm sure your dog is super friendly but we can't know that esp with young kids).

This park is a hidden gem can see they are trying to improve the place at the front and they desperately need to upgrade the amenities on both sides before spending any money on anything else.(There is a large and small amenities)

I would definitely stay here  again though.

The pelican holiday park was amazing and we just left now and heading home to Kogarah NSW. One of the parking in K2 had a wasp nest and feicies coming out and on the floor. The TV inside was broken and tilted on a left angle which made it impossible to watch TV even the TV screen is shaded black on the right side. I wish I provided images but me and my family were in a rush to leave due to work. Overall this experience was great but I reccomend you guys fix the wasp nest issue and the fecies coming out.
Great family getaway, Staff were friendly and very helpful, super quite and clean, Loved seeing the birds on the water. The kids spent the whole day riding the buggies!
Omg, spent 3 nites. Majestic, peaceful, welcoming staff, great outdoor bbq facilities. A gem.

We were greeted with a big smile and friendly face, we stayed in Oystercatcher 2 cabin which was awesome! Comfy king bed, modern and clean. The only thing would be the phone reception and internet was a bit slow for remote working. Beautiful views of the river and walking path on the road side

Well
What a great place.  Wonderful staff and service. Brilliant cabin. Spotless, well serviced  excellent water views from my balcony.  Very affordable and one of my best stays.  100% recommended.
The Delux Cabins are beautyful.

We had such a wonderful experience at Pelican Caravan Park! The park is in a beautiful, peaceful location right by the river, perfect for relaxing and enjoying nature. The facilities were clean and well-maintained, and the grounds are spacious with plenty of shady spots. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, always happy to help and made us feel right at home. It’s also a great spot for families, with a safe and relaxed atmosphere.

What a find. Have been to Nambucca Heads on several holidays but this is the first time we have stayed in a holiday park.
Booked a cabin called Oystercatcher right across from the river. Beautiful view. The cabin was large with a king bed.
We will definitely come back and this time bring our fishing gear.

Well what can I say a complete waste of time and money, should have left sooner?  The amenity blocks are gross had to clean shower before I could have a shower and then had water filling up from the drain and hair floating around the floor 🤮🤮, no toilet paper for about 3 days so had to always take my own. The site we had had grey water spilling out of the camp kitchen area into our site, try to use the microwave well that was an experience 🤢🤢 never been cleaned and had a complimentary cockroach in it. I’ve travelled a lot to different caravan parks and never had any issues, they have also be tip top but this one wow it was so not worth it. And don’t even get me started on the cabins we had to be moved at 10:30pm at night as our room was not cleaned, there was food left in the microwave, hair on the bathroom floor, hair though out the bed
Cigarette buds in the lounge and god knows what in the else there was. We had to re wash and clean a lot of the stuff we wanted to use as they were really gross and the place mats in the room were full of mould and old food🤮🤮🤮🤮. And even after moving to a new cabin it was ok but same sort of issues again. Cos it rain when we were their the site got very muddy and I can tell you it did not smell like wet dirty mud it had a sewage smell to it grossss 🤮🤮🤮🤮🤮, by this time we had enough and left a day earlier and went and stay in a much cleaner and nicer caravan park.

We have been traveling for 3 months now and I’ve thought about leaving reviews previously, but haven’t bothered until now. We have stayed in some amazing places and some not so great…this one has to fall into maybe the absolute worst.
I can not believe this park falls under the G’day parks banner. The amenities are terrible, one toilet and one shower for the men, two toilets and one gross shower for the ladies…but don’t forget to BYO toilet paper!!! Not a piece to be found.
The place is full of permanent residents who spend there days sitting on their verandas watching the few campers go about there day…creepy.
After three months traveling with our dogs, this was also the first place to charge us to have a dog stay!!!! Ok if they supplied poo bags or any dog amenities at all, but nope….lucky to get human amenities 🤣.
If your after an over priced park with a lovely river view, where you will be watched by locals, are happy to share a toilet and bring your own toilet paper, then this park is for you! If not, then do yourself a favor and find somewhere else.

Under new management, doing their best but have a long way to go.
I'll take my chances in the state Forrest.

Great little caravan park. Good rates, relaxed lifestyle. Great river views, easy access to fishing from bank, boat or jetty.
New owners are making some beautiful changes, will be looking forward to them all

Very nice to stay.|Positive :|Affordable, friendly receptionist |Very spacious, nice kitchen, dining area and a balcony with the view of the lake. Not far from the shopping Centre.||Negative:|It’s upstairs.|Internet did not work.
Great place, great service. Thanks

Great location if you want water front views on the river. Launch a boat from the park and go fishing on the river. Nambucca river is an excellent place to fish. Toilet amenities are not the greatest, but if you have your own ensuite in your caravan, it is perfect.

Stopover on my  trip south and back.
Dog friendly.
Bring a rod. Wish I did, will next time  :)

Had a great stay at the park, lovely place with the river and wildlife.
The staff are welcoming, friendly and attentive to any needs.
Would recommend a stay anytime as situated close to all amenities

From as soon as you check in Sharon Manager and Rebecca staff makes you feel welcome and has fantastic ,Helpful attitude towards guests.Very clean and tidy cabins and surrounds.Peaceful and relaxing along river frontage would not hesitate recommending pelican park to others.Being in between macksville and Nambucca Heads makes accessing Pubs Clubs restaurants and woollies handy .
Owner is so rude!

Cant say anything bad about the staff, they were lovely and friendly, and helped us out with a good site. But... it is run down, only one shower in the toilet block near the river and even though we were plugged into power we didnt notice that the power had tripped until the next morning so our batteries in our campervan where flat on leaving (not happened to us before so not our van). The riverside is lovely though and we had a quiet peacful night despite it being a long weekend-

The most friendly and accommodating people - Rebecca, Darren and Sharon.  Great cabin - Pelican 1 - modern, spacious and value for money and of course the great view, overlooking the river.  (The toilet needed a clean, but no big deal, we were prepared)!

We had a high set cabin , beautiful and fairly new . Very nice deco furniture. Bed was very comfortable. Great for families .loved it. Pet friendly is a bonus   Caravan sites and camp sites also,available . Park was clean and tidy grounds , ‘overall it was a great stay and would recommend it.
A horrible experience

Room was dirty! The dishes weren't washed properly, their was a bar of used soap from the people before me still in the shower!! Their was also bread in between the lounges.. was not happy with the cleanliness, absolutely filthy especially the used soap
The best park at nambucca

Lovely staff
Lovely stay
Lovely all round

Beautiful..clean .. great location.. they opened up for us thank you so much..the room had a gorgeous shower great water flow very spacious and good hot n cold settings... our room had a massive bed and comfortable for us plenty of luxurious pillows ... washing machine and drier a trough .. 2 TV's for us lazy people under cover parking ... the room was big enough to swing an elephant but we didn't have an elephant so can't prove it ... for us the stay was beautiful

This park advertises sites for one person. They then add for second person and service dog in my case. $83 a night. Currently under renovations, so main amenities are not operational and lower amenities in poor condition. One toilet and shower for women, same for men's. Dump pit was either blocked or full. Park is located out of themain town. Definitely not value for money, wouldn't recommend.

Staff lovely, grass powered sites neat. However for $84 a night,  the amenity block is in disrepair (owners did mention they are renovating) only one toilet and shower in each. The waste dump full or blocked. Long way out of time.  Very overpriced for what you get.
They advertise in here(google map), a site from $35, I called and apparently they don’t do unpowered site and price $57/night powered instead of $35.
Stayed in a Caravan

While the majority of reviews are for the cabins, this review is based a powered caravan site.
I booked here by mistake. Will be more cautious as we keep travelling. $80 for riverside and $69 for behind cabins. We chose the grassed area as $80 was ridiculous. Apparently, they had 20mm of rain the night before, and the grassed area was like walking on a swamp. They must have known this and should have offered riverside for the same price. Even $69 was overpriced. Would not stay here again. 1 star.

Loved being on the river!
Cabin was basic but exactly what we wanted.
Staff were absolutely lovely.
Pleasant staff, friendly campers, clean amenities & BBQ areas.

Loved our stay at Pelican Caravan Park. The owners and staff were just so lovely and very accommodating. We loved the stunning location and how it was not crowded. Dog friendly was also a bonus! We look forward to returning in the near future.

We stayed here over Xmas break in our motor home, Sharon put us right next to the pool it was so private no neighbours a little paradise , only couldn’t get the TV reception but other than that Sharon was so accommodating even gave me washing powder which anywhere else would have charged me , also gave us some dvd,s to watch as no tv reception in our van
Thanks Sharon & the staff as well were so accommodating
Deb & Col .

This is a Beautiful spot. very  Quiet. Impeccable service from Sharon. Sharon is very welcoming and suits the job od running a park like this. Great amenities. Beds are very comfortable.  Would definitely go back.

I couldn’t recommend pelican caravan park enough. The best,  maintained park I’ve been, with very thoughtful amenities in common area. We had to cancel our booking last min last year due to medical emergency. They were so accommodating with my last minute request, so I decided I have to visit them again this year. I was NOT disappointed. We had the river view cabin, newly renovated. Super clean, and fully equipped. We only had 2 nights there and it wasn’t enough at all. I want to thank Sharon personally for being so kind and welcoming every time I stepped in the office. I would love to be there again…and again!

Great customer service from the moment we arrived super friendly and helpful
Was amazed by the cabin how clean it was and nice
Air con in every room
Smart tv
Dishwasher
Washer and dryer
Undercover parking
Swimming pool
Short drive to shops
Great views
Comfy bed
Will definitely stay again

Open door to van I got headach from strong smell of poison inside out walls Saturated with the smell, the carpet  lounge . Why would spray poison in fridge which took me 3 goes to get smell out.|Cleanen all surfaces sink etc too|All utensils dishes etc.||Had to put a towel on lounge to sit.|I didn't sleep, the smell, took me 2 hours to clean.||Non of the windows had locks|It was awful.||No shops around lived on baked beans. 10 min taxi to and from bus terminals  cost 50 their explanation it was the weekend no one charges 50 for a 10 min drive.||The outside walls Saturated too as I open windows and door to air out place you can smell it.||I arrived near 4am  no one around to call

Arrived 330 am opened the door unit 7
Omg the smell in there beyond  words  had clean everything down to kitchen sink had to put a towel on lounge to sit on.
What ever it was the smell on carpet and all areas and bench top took me 2 hours to clean all services.

Than I open.fridge it smelled worse cleaned it 3 times.
Threw out the sachet of coffee sugar and tea 4 of each as the smell went through it all
Most of the windows didn't have any locks on them, had to get him to put some dowl in windows. Hang up on me twice when I asked him for the wiify ..
No phone reception only 1 bar, people could not reach me.

Housing arranged it for me as I was homeless
Flea and cocroach infected as well, the smell of poison on carpet and blinds the blind in bedroom kept coming down as 1 side was broken
I was given the worst cabin because housing booked it for I assume.
Not cleaned or aired out. My complain will go to health department. Opening the cubards in kitchen they smelled the same
That I got a headache from the moment I opened the cabin door.
2 hours to clean everything  and I had no sleep that night. Also a firetrap no smoke detecter

The town taxi service is the worst 😫  for 10 min from busstop to the cabin, women driver mind you, was unfriendly a ride that would only cost 10...she asked for 50 her explanation it was Sunday they charge extra on Sunday.. .
I said all I have was 40 on me. That didn't go right with her....no other taxi service charges 50 for 10 min drive from bus stop to pelican caravan park.

I will complain to fair trade and ombudsman
I would not give 1 star
Clean n quiet lovely overlooking lake
These pics are not the caravan park
Nice relaxing place with alot to do... not sure during the busy season... and a few cool local places to chill at...

I have been here at the pelican now for 8 weeks & I wish I could get a booking here 4 months prior as when I tried pelican was booked out. Sharon  & Tony are the park owners & the Pelican Park manager Darren booked my husband & myself in & we we’re booked in & settled by mid morning the day we arrived. Maintenance & Housekeeping staff  Rebecca who I must say has been absolutely amazing. Cleaning kits , weekly services to change linin ect always willing to help if you need to ask for anything, Bec will get it done. All in all this park has a fabulous location & the park is so beautiful, clean. Management have gone above & beyond to assist me myself & my husband & to Sharon & Darren I’ll be grateful you found the room for us at the pelican. I would recommend this park out if any of the parks in Nambucca. It’s a different feel to the White Albatross & reflections, Tasman & I would vote the pelican as best customer service & there guests are always there and priority ti make sure everything is all ok & the stay is pleasant. I gave throughly enjoyed my time here & the local residents are all so friendly. I will definitely always book my family & friends here at the pelican as we are having Christmas this year so I’ll have to get my dates in.
Dog friendly, stayed in a lovely cabin overlooking the river. Quiet and peaceful location, friendly helpful staff. Will definitely stay again!

The cabin we stayed in was amazing & perfect for a family of 6 , it had everything you need . The kitchen has stove tops , dishwasher & it included 3 aircons in each roomplus the lounge , great balcony space and view .
Nice location, quiet, river front
Clean cabin. Good amenities.  Undercover parking!!

My partner and I were so lucky to come across pelican caravan park! After our van broke down, the caravan park staff were super accomodating and made sure we were looked after from the get go, not to mention the beautiful permanent residents who went above and beyond to look after us also! Darren provided us with fishing rods and a kayak to enjoy the surroundings while being stuck in the area to fill out our days! The dolphins even popped in to give us a playful show! I could not recommend this holiday park highly enough, Thankyou all again 🙏🏻
